creator: 4721@hushmail.com
text:
* update devel/avr-gcc from 4.5.1 to 4.6.2
* remove duplicate devel/avr-binutils depend
* add LICENSE
* remove duplicate WRKSRC
* use vendor patchset directly instead of importing into the ports collection
* switch plist to use dynamic version number instead of static version number
